root_cause: set -u kills script when $USER is unset in Podman containers (podman exec doesn't set USER)
fix: Added USER="${USER:-$(whoami)}" near top of script

error_message: Script dies silently after WireGuard step — sysctl -w fails in containers
root_cause: sudo sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1 returns non-zero in containers (no /proc/sys write access), set -e kills script
fix: Added || true to sysctl and wg-quick systemctl lines

root_cause: No user session bus available in Podman containers

error_message: Dashboard Caddyfile exposes API endpoints to all IPs
root_cause: :80 block had no @local IP restriction, allowing /api/exec, /v1/*, /api/transcribe from any IP
fix: Added @local remote_ip matcher wrapping all proxy handles in dashboard/Caddyfile

error_message: IP leaked to ifconfig.me during WireGuard setup
root_cause: curl https://ifconfig.me sends public IP to third-party service, violates privacy preference
fix: Removed ifconfig.me call, default to LAN IP, warn user to manually set public IP for remote access

root_cause: install -m 600 /dev/null then cat > reopens file with default umask (644)
fix: Replaced with (umask 077; cat > file << EOF ... EOF) subshell

error_message: Temp dirs not cleaned on script failure
root_cause: VLLM_TMP, YAY_TMPDIR, WG_KEY_DIR not included in EXIT trap
fix: Added all temp vars to the trap cleanup line
